task_description: Find and review a faculty member’s profile in an energy engineering college, including their courses, research, publications, and scientific awards and honors.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in area centers on the Google search field beneath the multicolor Google logo. The active text entry box contains the query “zhejiang university,” with the text cursor at the end, indicating text is being entered or completed in the search field rather than selecting a suggestion. A dropdown of search suggestions is open below, including “zhejiang university - Google 搜索” and university-related suggestions. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open on a new tab page in Chinese, with the Google homepage visible and the search field focused in the middle of the page.
caption.action: type "ZHEJIANG UNIVERSITY" into the Google search field, replacing any existing partial query or completing the current entry.
caption.expectation: The search field should contain the full text “ZHEJIANG UNIVERSITY,” and the suggestions below should update to match that query.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the centered Google search box with the query "zhejiang university" fully typed and a blinking text cursor at the end. A suggestions panel is open directly below, with the top highlighted suggestion reading "zhejiang university - Google 搜索," followed by results such as "zhejiang university," "Zhejiang University of Technology," and other related university suggestions. The full-screen image shows Google Chrome on the Google homepage in Chinese, with the multicolor Google logo above the search box and the suggestions dropdown still expanded.
caption.action: Press ENTER to submit the current Google search.
caption.expectation: The suggestions dropdown should disappear and Google should load the search results page for "zhejiang university."

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the purple underlined search result title "Zhejiang University (ZJU)," which is a clickable web result link. Around it are the result snippet lines mentioning "Seeking Truth, Pursuing Innovation" and site links below. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is displaying Google results for "zhejiang university" in Chinese. The clicked item is the top organic result from www.zju.edu.cn, with additional sitelinks on the left and a knowledge panel for 浙江大学 on the right.
caption.action: Click the purple link titled "Zhejiang University (ZJU)."
caption.expectation: The browser should open the Zhejiang University website page for that search result.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the white three-line hamburger icon and the label "MENU" in the website's top-right navigation area, beside the Chinese language text. This is a UI control in the page header. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open on the Zhejiang University English website homepage, showing a large banner image of pink blossoms and a lit interior behind windows, with the university logo on the upper left, navigation links across the top, and a small Google Translate popup near the top-right.
caption.action: Click the "MENU" hamburger button in the page's top-right header.
caption.expectation: The website should open or expand the navigation menu, revealing additional site navigation options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the white text link "Schools & Colleges" in the open mega-menu. It appears as a clickable menu item in the right-hand submenu list under the highlighted "Education & Research" section. In the full-screen view, Chrome is on the Zhejiang University English site with a dark blue translucent navigation overlay open. The top navigation includes items like About, Education & Research, Global, Sustainability, Discover ZJU, and News, and the submenu on the right lists "Schools & Colleges," "Admissions," "Research Highlights," "Academic Resources," and "Academic Calendar."
caption.expectation: The site should open the Schools & Colleges page or load content for that section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full browser viewport with no semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action on the page rather than a specific control. The visible webpage is the Zhejiang University "Schools & Colleges" page, with a large banner image of a modern building under a blue sky, the white heading "Schools & Colleges," and faint breadcrumb text below reading "Home," "Education & Research," and "Schools & Colleges." In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open on the ZJU website, and the page content appears positioned near the top of the article, so the main webpage is the scrollable region.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, revealing content below the banner, such as the list or details of schools and colleges.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue underlined text link "College of Energy Engineering" within a list of engineering-related links. It is a clickable text item in the page content, not a toolbar control. In the full-screen view, Chrome displays the Zhejiang University Schools & Colleges page, scrolled to the "Engineering" section on the left with multiple blue underlined school names, and a large photo of students working with a tracked robot on the right.
caption.action: Click the "College of Energy Engineering" link.
caption.expectation: The browser should open the College of Energy Engineering page, loading details for that college.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the top navigation tab labeled "FACULTY," displayed in dark text on a light gray navigation bar with a red underline beneath it. This is a website navigation control in the page header, not a blank area or canvas object. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open on the Zhejiang University College of Energy Engineering site. The red site header shows the university logo and bilingual college name, with top navigation items including HOME, ABOUT, FACULTY, ACADEMICS, RESEARCH, STUDENT LIFE, and INTERNATIONAL. A large banner image below shows a traditional building and the overlaid text "ZHEJIANG UNIVERSITY."
caption.expectation: The Faculty section should open or refresh, showing faculty-related content and keeping that tab selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the underlined faculty name link "Cheng Jun" in the faculty list under the red section heading "Institute of Thermal Power Engineering (ITPE)." This is a clickable text link in the page content, not a toolbar or blank region. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is displaying the Zhejiang University College of Energy Engineering FACULTY page, with the top site navigation bar and a multi-column list of faculty names; "Cheng Jun" appears highlighted as a red underlined link among other names.
caption.action: Click the underlined faculty name "Cheng Jun."
caption.expectation: The faculty member's profile page or detail view for Cheng Jun should open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the full browser viewport without any red X, indicating a scroll action rather than a click. The page is on Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for CHENG JUN, with a blue header at the top, a profile card showing the name "CHENG JUN" and "Ph.D.," contact and research details, tab buttons including "Biography," "Courses," "Research," "Publications," and "Scientific Awards and Honors:", and the biography content beginning below. On the right is a "Related People" sidebar with small portrait tiles. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open on the faculty personal homepage tab, a small Google Translate popup is visible near the top right, and the vertical scrollbar indicates the page can be moved further downward.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward to reveal more of Cheng Jun's profile content below the currently visible biography section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Courses" in the horizontal profile tab row. It is a clickable page tab control, with "Biography" currently highlighted in blue to the left and other tabs such as "Research," "Publications," and "Scientific Awards and Honors:" to the right. In the full-screen view, Chrome is displaying the Zhejiang University personal homepage for Cheng Jun. The biography content is visible below the tabs, and a right sidebar shows related people with portrait thumbnails. A small Google Translate popup is open near the top right.
caption.expectation: The page should switch from the current biography section to the courses section, making the "Courses" tab active and updating the content area below.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Research" in the horizontal content tab row. It is a clickable page tab control next to the currently active blue "Courses" tab, with "Publications" to the right. In the full-screen view, Chrome is displaying Cheng Jun's Zhejiang University personal homepage. The main content area currently shows a numbered "Main Courses" list, and a right sidebar displays related people with portrait thumbnails. This click is on a UI control within the page content area, not a blank region or canvas object.
caption.expectation: The Research tab should become active, the courses list should be replaced with Cheng Jun's research-related content, and the page should remain on the same profile.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Publications" in the horizontal tab row. It is a clickable page tab control, positioned to the right of the currently active blue "Research" tab and to the left of "Scientific Awards and Honors:". In the full-screen view, Chrome is open to Cheng Jun's Zhejiang University personal homepage. The main content area is still showing the "Main Courses" list, and a right sidebar displays related people with portrait thumbnails. This is a click on a UI control within the page content area.
caption.expectation: The Publications tab should become active, and the content area below should update to show Cheng Jun's publication information.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Scientific Awards and Honors:" in the horizontal tab row. It is a clickable page tab control immediately to the right of the currently active blue "Publications" tab. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open to Cheng Jun's Zhejiang University personal homepage. The main content area currently lists numbered publication entries, and a right sidebar shows portrait thumbnails of related people. This is a click on a UI control within the page content area.
caption.action: Click the "Scientific Awards and Honors:" tab.
caption.expectation: The "Scientific Awards and Honors:" tab should become active, and the publications list should be replaced with Cheng Jun's awards and honors content.
